message:
fix: resolve lint errors in production code

- analytics-provider.tsx: Fix impure Date.now() call during render by
  initializing pageStartTime ref with 0 instead of Date.now()
- evidence/page.tsx: Escape quotes in JSX pre block using "
- track/route.ts: Remove unused parseError catch variable
- assumption-lifecycle.ts: Remove unused reqCheck variable assignment
